title: Low bend loss optical fiber with a germania doped core
abstract: A single mode optical fiber including a germania doped silica central core region having outer radius r1 and refractive index ГҺВ”1, a maximum refractive index ГҺВ”1, and 0.32 % ГўВүВӨ ГҺВ”1max ГўВүВӨ 0.45 %, and a core alpha profile (CoreГҺВұ). In various embodiments, the optical fiber also contains a cladding region including: (i) a second inner cladding region or ring region surrounding the first inner cladding region; or (ii) an inner cladding region or pedestal region surrounding the germania doped silica central core region. The corresponding resultant optical fibers exhibit a 22 m cable cutoff less than or equal to 1260 nm, a macrobending loss at 1550 nm of ГўВүВӨ 0.75 dB/turn on a 20 mm diameter mandrel, a zero dispersion wavelength, ГҺВ»0, of 1300 nm ГўВүВӨ ГҺВ»0 ГўВүВӨ 1324 nm, and a mode field diameter at 1310 nm of 8.2 microns ГўВүВӨ MDF1310 ГўВүВӨ 9.6 microns.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1. A single mode optical fiber comprising: a germania doped silica central core region having outer radius n and 3.5 microns < n < 5.5 microns and refractive index ГҺВ”ГҺВ№_ a maximum refractive index ГҺВ”ГҺВҷ ГҺВ ГҺВ’ГҺВ§ , and 0.32 % < ГҺВ”ГҺВҷ ГҺВ ГҺВ’ГҺВ§ < 0.45 %, and a core alpha profile, Core a where 1 < Core a ГўВүВӨ 100; and a cladding region comprising (i) a first inner cladding region surrounding the germania doped silica central core region having an outer radius r 2 and 4.5 microns < r 2 < 7.5 microns and refractive index ГҺВ” 2 and an ri/r 2 ratio and 0.60 < ri/r 2 < 0.90; (ii) and a second inner cladding region surrounding the first inner cladding region having an outer radius r 3 and 5.5 microns < r 3 < 20.5 microns, comprising refractive index ГҺВ” 3 , and a maximum refractive index A3ma X and 0.02 % < A3ma X < 0.15 %; and (iii) an outer cladding region surrounding the second inner cladding region and comprising refractive index ГҺВ”4, wherein Aima X > A3ma X > ГҺВ”4 ГўВүВҘГҺВ” 2 ; wherein the single mode optical fiber exhibits a 22 m cable cutoff less than or equal to 1260 nm, a macrobending loss at 1550 nm of < 0.75 dB/turn on a 20 mm diameter mandrel, has a zero dispersion wavelength, ГҺВ»ГҺВҝ, of 1300 nm < ГҺВ»ГҺВҝГўВүВӨ 1324 nm, and a mode field diameter at 1310 nm of 8.2 microns < MDFmonmГўВүВӨ 9.6 microns. 2. The single mode optical fiber of claim 1 , wherein the macrobending loss at 1550 nm is < 0.5 dB/turn on a 20 mm diameter mandrel. 3. The single mode optical fiber of any of claims 1-2, wherein the macrobending loss at 1550 nm is < 0.05 dB/turn on a 30 mm diameter mandrel. 4. The single mode optical fiber of any of claims 1-3, wherein the macrobending loss at 1550 nm is < 0.005 dB/turn on a 30 mm diameter mandrel. 5.
